product_updates.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
product_updates.content: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

product_updates.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
product_updates.content: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."

product_updates.title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
product_updates.content: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
technical_breakthroughs.content: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Three things in AI to watch, according to a Nobel-winning economist
technical_breakthroughs.content: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. technical_breakthroughs.title: Fostering breakthrough AI innovation through customer-back engineering
technical_breakthroughs.content: Despite years of digitization, organizations capture less than one-third of the value expected from digital investments, according to McKinsey research. That’s because most big companies begin with technological capabilities and bolt applications onto them, rather than starting with customer need…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Innovation abounds in device charging
technical_breakthroughs.content: The changes may be less perceptible than in smartphones, tablets, or wearables, but chargers have also been quietly reinvented over the last decade. At one time a bulky mix of tangled cables and connectors, slow to perform and prone to overheating, they’re now smaller, safer, and faster, thanks t…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Implementing advanced AI technologies in finance
technical_breakthroughs.content: In finance departments that have long been defined by precision and control, AI has arrived less as a neatly managed upgrade than as a quiet insurgency. Employees are already using it while leadership races to impose structure, governance, and strategy after the fact. The result is a paradox: one…

technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
